name: Climbing Score LLC
description_short: Climbing Score LLC is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 3.7/5 on Google.
description_long:
Climbing Score LLC is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. The company serves consumers in the New York area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Climbing Score LLC specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Climbing Score LLC operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Climbing Score LLC should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
